About Me

I’m a computer science major with a finance minor, drawn to where rigorous engineering meets human judgement — building AI products people trust, and understanding markets from first principles. I'm eager to explore the variety of the world, as well as providing technical solutions to global issues.

A Closer Look

Singapore vs. Hong Kong Quant Trading Hackathon

TEAM LEADER2026

I led a team of 4 to 10th place in the competition (out of 200+ candidates in Hong Kong) by developing a machine learning strategy with XGBoost and implementing an automated trading bot in Python. Our team designed features from historical price data and evaluated strategy performance using backtesting.

BETA Hackathon 

SAN FRANSISCO2026

In this hackathon, we focused on AI companionship and built an AI Sports Companion Avatar. It can receive both live match or recording as input, capturing live information in the match and interacting with users. The highlight of this product lies in multi-personality virtual avatar and active response, which provides users with highly customized experience. Our product also got sponsored by Spatial Real, who provided us support in virtual avatar image.

AI-powered Cantonese translator & tutoring APP

Side Project2026

Based on my own experience and challenges in learning Cantonese, I built this APP and integrated it with AI feature. The APP is targeted at new immigrants from mainland China and who have the needs to integrate with local Cantonese-speaking community. The AI-powered translator helps user go through language barriers in daily life in an efficient way, while the tutoring APP is intended to help the users understand and speak the language fluently. 

Smart Ordering System

VOLUNTEER PROJECT2026

A local family-run restaurant encountered challenges in handling the customers' orders during busy hours. Along with another 2 students, we collaborated and developed the smart ordering system, including the frontend website and the backend connected to the order printer. We were glad to apply the knowledge we learn to solve real-world problems. 

Co-founder of Gonitour Business Group

The Gonitour Business Group is a platform intended to offer internal job information and part-time job opportunities to its members (mainly university students) Designed a career-planning camp and cooperated with famous financial companies including AIA, Deloitte etc.

Chairman of  HKU XGravity Outdoor Club 2024-2025

Worked as the chairman of the club, organizing internal meetings, distributing tasks and contacting sponsors Organized a 6-day skiing event in Xinjiang and a 5-day cycling event in Taiwan

Global Volunteer Leader

In summer 2024, I joined a 6-week volunteer program led by Sarajevo Youth Center in Bosnia and Hercegovina. It was a wonderful experience to get exposed to local culture as well as helping people in need. During the 6-week service, I along with other global volunteers provided service in Local Summer Camp, Refugee Camp, Community Center etc. 

CEA Summer Volunteer Education Program

Delivered two weeks of courses in a primary school in Guangxi, China. The topics of the courses include art, history, geography, artificial intelligence and mental health Learned practical communication skills with children and developed a better understanding about the education in the undeveloped areas in China

Traveling

I've travelled to more than 20 countries since childhood. Traveling is not only a process of exploring different cultures, but also a deep talk with my own mind. During the trip, I often raise questions to myself like "what kind of life do I really want?", "Am I really living with happiness?" . My next plan is a trans-Europe cycling trip from Amsterdam to Athens(not sure about the time though). DM me if you're interested!

Airsoft

For Airsoft, I'm mainly interested in Wargame and IPSC, as well as collecting some classic airsoft guns and gears. Wargame requires efficient strategy and communication among commander, squad leaders and members, as well as cooperation among teammates to reach the goal. Wargame also involves different modes, including CQB, bomb defuse, hostage rescue etc., creating more joy for this game. 

Cooking

I'm keen on Asian food, especially Sichuanese, Cantonese and Thai food. Now my main focus is on Sichuanese and Cantonese food. Specialty includes Kung Pao Chicken, Soy Sauce Shrimp, Twice-cooked meat, Fried Chinese Broccoli with Garlic etc. I'm also on my way to learn the theory of French and Spanish cuisine. 

LEGO & minifigure

I enjoy the feeling of diving into the world of LEGO Bricks. I've fallen in love with LEGO since I received my first LEGO set on my 4th birthday. I then started making my own creation (moc) since primary school and learned to use digital designing tools in high school. I treat LEGO not only as toy, but a kind of art to express the thoughts deep in our minds. 

Fencing

I took up fencing during the second year of my university. What's attractive about fencing is that it's not only a game of strength and speed, but also a game of  strategy.
